summary: Started M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 after M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001 closure entered origin/main. This task validates save migration compatibility and cloud-save candidate decision boundaries without implementing cloud save, accounts, network sync, telemetry, secrets, providers, or irreversible migration.

tests_run.result: Branch codex/m7-save-migration-cloud-boundaries created from clean origin/main.
Ready tasks were M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 and M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001; selected save/cloud boundary task as highest-priority dependency-ready M7 task.

decisions.decision: Start the R4 systems_architect task now that previous UI guidance closure is integrated and task dependencies are satisfied.
This task may define and test rejection/decision boundaries only; no account, network, provider, telemetry, secret, paid service, or cloud implementation is authorized.
No Human Gate is active; irreversible migration and cloud-save enablement remain Human Gates if encountered.

risks.summary: Compatibility-boundary work can drift into irreversible migration behavior or save-format commitments.
risks.mitigation: Writer must keep changes parser-validated and reversible/test-oriented, and route any irreversible or frozen decision to Human Gate and security review.

risks.summary: Cloud-save wording could accidentally imply account/network/provider implementation.
risks.mitigation: Task explicitly forbids accounts, network sync, secrets, remote collection, paid services, telemetry, server, and provider integration.

requested_action: Systems architect should implement/validate within allowed paths, write writer REVIEW handoff, and route to security_reviewer. Do not open PR, merge, or mark CLOSED.
